_description: Metadata for Old Rapa Nui text sources. One entry per source file in this directory.
_note: Populate text files as plain .txt with one utterance per line. Bracketed text in [square brackets] denotes scholarly reconstructions (controlled by data.include_reconstructions in config.yaml).

sources.citation: Blixen, O. (1979). Algunas consideraciones acerca de los textos del kai-kai pascuense. Moana, 2(1).
sources.notes: Kaikai are string-figure chants that preserve archaic vocabulary.

sources.citation: Barthel, T. S. (1960). Grundlagen zur Entzifferung der Osterinselschrift. Hamburg: de Gruyter.
sources.notes: Some lines contain bracketed reconstructions by Barthel.
